text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Praise be! Grace has granted me<n>fortune again on
the chrysanthemum<n>stage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how my lucky stride<n>blew right past
all the other runners? I<n>didn't even recognize
myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All the luck I've gathered has set<n>something
aflame within me... Just<n>what is becoming of me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's no other<n>explanation! I could
never run like that<n>normally.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then, today I must be the incarnation<n>of
happiness! Just like a plump,<n>happy Buddha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahaha! This is the power of the<n>gods! Luck
will take me to the highest<n>peaks!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If we simply ride this cresting wave<n>of fortune, our
future will certainly be<n>assured!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer, what shall our next<n>challenge
be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Shall we let our momentum carry us<n>forward,
smashing our way right<n>through the Japan Cup
and the Arima<n>Kinen?!
choice_data_list: I-I don't think that's in the cards just yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Now that I've been reborn, those<n>races are
practically a walk in the<n>park.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: If not there, where do we go?
choice_data_list: Let's shoot for next year's Kinko Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kinko Sho... Isn't that next<n>spring? That's
pretty far off...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Very well! This year's<n>accomplishments will just
have to<n>satisfy me for now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a hunch, I decide to give us a little<n>breathing
room.<n>Matikanefukukitaru's behavior is
beginning to concern me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eh? What do you mean? I've<n>reached
enlightenment. I'm doing<n>much better than simply
"okay."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm off for my interview. I<n>wonder what I
should say... Maybe<n>I'll tell them about meeting
the gods!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She skips away with an<n>uncharacteristically
exaggerated<n>spring in her step,
